summary: Tested Mobile Phone Maintenance Module (صيانة الهواتف النقالة). Backend APIs: 17/17 passed. Frontend pages load correctly. Critical finding: RepairTrackingPage and SparePartsPage use hardcoded SAMPLE data instead of fetching from backend APIs.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Page uses hardcoded SAMPLE_REPAIRS array (lines 74-151) instead of fetching from /api/repairs. The page initializes with useState(SAMPLE_REPAIRS) and never calls the API to fetch real repairs.
CRITICAL: Page uses hardcoded SAMPLE_PARTS array (lines 71-137) instead of fetching from /api/spare-parts. The page initializes with useState(SAMPLE_PARTS) and never calls the API.
Status update only modifies local state, doesn't call PUT /api/repairs/{id}. Local changes are lost on page refresh.
Add/Edit/Delete operations only modify local state, don't call POST/PUT/DELETE /api/spare-parts endpoints.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test@test.com/test123 (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/repairs/stats - Returns repair statistics (total, received, diagnosing, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/repairs - Returns list of repairs
Backend: POST /api/repairs - Creates new repair ticket (tested via API and UI)
Backend: GET /api/repairs/{id} - Retrieves single repair
Backend: PUT /api/repairs/{id} - Updates repair status
Backend: DELETE /api/repairs/{id} - Deletes repair ticket
Backend: GET /api/repairs?status=diagnosing - Filter by status works
Backend: GET /api/repairs?search=TEST - Search functionality works
Backend: GET /api/spare-parts/stats - Returns spare parts statistics
Backend: GET /api/spare-parts - Returns list of spare parts
Backend: POST /api/spare-parts - Creates new spare part
Backend: GET /api/spare-parts/{id} - Retrieves single spare part
Backend: PUT /api/spare-parts/{id} - Updates spare part
Backend: DELETE /api/spare-parts/{id} - Deletes spare part
Backend: GET /api/spare-parts?category=screen - Filter by category works
Backend: GET /api/spare-parts?search=TEST - Search functionality works
Frontend: Login page loads and works correctly
Frontend: RepairTrackingPage (/repairs) loads with data-testid, shows stats and table
Frontend: RepairReceptionPage (/repairs/new) loads with form, successfully creates repairs via API
Frontend: SparePartsPage (/repairs/parts) loads with data-testid, shows stats and table
Frontend: Sidebar has الصيانة (Maintenance) section with 3 links
action_items: CRITICAL: Add useEffect in RepairTrackingPage.js to fetch repairs from /api/repairs on mount
CRITICAL: Add useEffect in SparePartsPage.js to fetch spare parts from /api/spare-parts on mount
Update RepairTrackingPage handleUpdateStatus() to call PUT /api/repairs/{id}
Update SparePartsPage handleSave() to call POST/PUT /api/spare-parts
Update SparePartsPage handleDelete() to call DELETE /api/spare-parts/{id}
Consider fetching stats from /api/repairs/stats and /api/spare-parts/stats instead of calculating locally
critical_code_review_comments: RepairTrackingPage.js line 155-156: useState(SAMPLE_REPAIRS) should be useState([]) with API fetch in useEffect
SparePartsPage.js line 141-142: useState(SAMPLE_PARTS) should be useState([]) with API fetch in useEffect
Both pages have functional backend APIs but frontend doesn't use them - data is hardcoded
RepairReceptionPage.js is correctly integrated - it posts to /api/repairs on form submit
Sample data mismatch: Frontend status values (in_repair, ready) differ from backend (in_progress, completed)

success_rate.frontend: 60% (Pages load but not fully integrated with backend APIs)

seed_data_creation: TEST repair tickets and spare parts created during pytest execution (then deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for repairs and spare-parts are fully functional and tested. The issue is frontend-backend integration: RepairTrackingPage.js and SparePartsPage.js use hardcoded sample data arrays instead of fetching from APIs. RepairReceptionPage.js works correctly - it successfully creates repairs via POST /api/repairs. Main agent needs to add API integration to the tracking and parts pages.

Repairs API /api/repairs/*.details: All CRUD operations work: GET list, GET single, POST create, PUT update, DELETE. Stats endpoint also works.

Spare Parts API /api/spare-parts/*.details: All CRUD operations work: GET list, GET single, POST create, PUT update, DELETE. Stats endpoint also works.

RepairReceptionPage (/repairs/new).details: Form correctly posts to /api/repairs, shows success dialog with ticket number

RepairTrackingPage (/repairs).details: UI loads but shows hardcoded SAMPLE_REPAIRS data. Does not fetch from /api/repairs

SparePartsPage (/repairs/parts).details: UI loads but shows hardcoded SAMPLE_PARTS data. Does not fetch from /api/spare-parts

RepairTrackingPage.js.required_fix: Add useEffect to fetch from /api/repairs and use useState([])

SparePartsPage.js.required_fix: Add useEffect to fetch from /api/spare-parts and use useState([])
